name: copy machine
description: A beige office copy machine, circa 1987. Its power light blinks green. A sheet of paper sits in the output tray. What this is doing in a logistics warehouse is anyone's guess.

name: sheet of paper
description: A single sheet of white paper, still warm from the copy machine. It reads: 'MEMORANDUM: All staff must dispose of documents properly. Failure to comply will result in disciplinary action.'

name: trash can
description: A plastic trash can with a swinging lid and a Generous Mart bear sticker. Someone has wedged a coffee cup into the lid so it won't close.
